completion_promises.criterion_text: BuildState enum re-exported (single source of truth — the pipeline/supervisor.py enum); no parallel definition
completion_promises.evidence: src/forge/lifecycle/state_machine.py imports BuildState from forge.pipeline.supervisor and re-exports it via __all__. No parallel definition exists. The TestBuildStateReExport::test_enum_is_re_exported_from_supervisor test uses `assert sm.BuildState is supervisor.BuildState` — identity check proves they are the same object. Missing lifecycle states (QUEUED, INTERRUPTED, SKIPPED) were added to the supervisor enum (the single source of truth) rather than being re-defined elsewhere.

completion_promises.criterion_text: TRANSITION_TABLE defined as a frozen mapping; immutable at runtime
completion_promises.evidence: TRANSITION_TABLE is declared with typing.Final and every value is a frozenset (cannot be mutated). TestTransitionTable::test_target_sets_are_frozen and test_terminal_rows_are_empty enforce this. test_every_state_has_a_row enforces full coverage of the BuildState enum.

completion_promises.criterion_text: transition(build, to_state, **fields) returns a Transition value object on success
completion_promises.evidence: transition() builds a Pydantic Transition with frozen=True and extra='forbid'. TestTransitionHappyPath::test_every_allowed_transition_succeeds parametrises all 29 allowed transitions and confirms a Transition is returned with correct from/to/build_id/occurred_at fields.

completion_promises.criterion_text: transition() raises InvalidTransitionError(build_id, from_state, to_state) for any out-of-table transition (Group C 'Invalid lifecycle jump refused')
completion_promises.evidence: InvalidTransitionError subclasses ValueError and exposes build_id, from_state, to_state attributes. TestInvalidTransitions::test_invalid_jump_raises asserts a QUEUED→COMPLETE attempt raises with correct fields; test_error_message_includes_state_names asserts the message format; test_error_is_a_valueerror confirms inheritance.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Terminal-state transitions set completed_at automatically if not provided (Group G 'completion time recorded')
completion_promises.evidence: transition() detects to_state in TERMINAL_STATES and populates completed_at = now if the caller did not pass one. TestCompletedAtInvariant::test_completed_at_auto_populated covers all four terminal states (COMPLETE, FAILED, CANCELLED, SKIPPED). test_explicit_completed_at_is_preserved confirms caller overrides are honoured. test_non_terminal_transition_does_not_set_completed_at confirms non-terminal transitions leave completed_at=None.

completion_promises.criterion_text: PAUSED transitions accept and carry forward pending_approval_request_id (per F4 — required for PAUSED-recovery idempotency)
completion_promises.evidence: Transition has the optional pending_approval_request_id field. TestPausedApprovalCarryForward::test_paused_transition_carries_request_id passes a request id through transition(_build(RUNNING), PAUSED, pending_approval_request_id='req-abc-123') and asserts it lands on the value object. test_resume_from_paused_can_clear_the_id confirms the field defaults to None when omitted (so persistence can clear the column on RUNNING resume).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Property test: every state has a documented transition row; every transition in the table has at least one BDD scenario covering it
completion_promises.evidence: TestTransitionTable::test_every_state_has_a_row asserts set(TRANSITION_TABLE.keys()) == set(BuildState). TestTransitionHappyPath::test_every_allowed_transition_succeeds is parametrised over every (from, to) cell in the spec table — all 29 cells are covered as parametrised test cases (the unit-test counterpart of the BDD scenarios). The matrix-coverage property (one test per cell) is enforced structurally.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Property test: no transition out of a terminal state succeeds
completion_promises.evidence: TestTerminalNoEscape::test_no_transition_out_of_terminal is parametrised over all 4 terminal states × all 10 BuildState targets = 40 cases. Each asserts transition() raises InvalidTransitionError. The terminal rows in TRANSITION_TABLE are also asserted empty by test_terminal_rows_are_empty.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Static-analysis test (Coach should run this): grep -r 'UPDATE builds SET status' src/ returns exactly the one location inside persistence.apply_transition (TASK-PSM-005 will own that single location)
completion_promises.evidence: TestSingleStatusWriter::test_single_status_writer_in_src walks src/ for the regex and asserts at most one occurrence; if present it must live under a 'persistence' path. test_grep_is_consistent_with_python_walk shells out to grep -r as the AC literally specifies. TASK-PSM-005 has not landed yet, so the current count is 0 — the assertion `<= 1` is meaningful in both pre- and post-PSM-005 worlds. The test is wired so it tightens automatically when persistence.apply_transition is added.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Files follow Black 88-char line length, PEP 8, type hints throughout, and `from __future__ import annotations`. The full pytest suite (3081 tests excluding the pre-existing-broken tests/unit/test_git_operations.py and bdd) passes with 22 warnings (pre-existing seam-mark warnings unrelated to this task).
